controller_model: Autopilot FUEL ST8 Light Controller 8 Outlet 240V

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot FUEL ST8 Light Controller 8 Outlet 240V
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any 1000W 240V HPS ballast, any 630W 240V CMH ballast, any 600W 240V MH ballast
compatible_devices.notes: 240V ONLY — 120V ballasts must not be used. On/off control via single 120V trigger cord from external timer or environmental controller. 8 outlets across 2 banks of 4 (30-second staggered power-on delay per bank to limit inrush current). 50A main supply required; 40A max ballast load; 5A per outlet (1200W capacity per outlet). ETL-listed. Any brand 240V HID ballast with NEMA 6-15 plug is compatible.
